title: stemodoxis juncea
intro: Stemodoxis juncea, also known as Chinese skullcap or ba jiao may, is a type of flowering plant native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stemodoxis juncea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
